---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.4]
- Node version: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- Browser (if frontend issue): [e.g. Chrome 125]

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.
